mapper.sql: id, user_id, memory_type, namespace, scope_type, scope_id, subject_key, content, summary, evidence_refs_json, source_task_id, source_tool_call_id, source_review_id, source_hash, status, confidence, importance, sensitivity_level, consent_source, access_count, last_accessed_at, valid_from, valid_until, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_memory_item ( id, user_id, memory_type, namespace, scope_type, scope_id, subject_key, content, summary, evidence_refs_json, source_task_id, source_tool_call_id, source_review_id, source_hash, status, confidence, importance, sensitivity_level, consent_source, access_count, last_accessed_at, valid_from, valid_until, deleted_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{memoryType}, #{namespace}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeId}, #{subjectKey}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{evidenceRefsJson}, #{sourceTaskId}, #{sourceToolCallId}, #{sourceReviewId}, #{sourceHash}, #{status}, #{confidence}, #{importance}, #{sensitivityLevel}, #{consentSource}, #{accessCount}, #{lastAccessedAt}, #{validFrom}, #{validUntil}, #{deletedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM agent_memory_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT FROM agent_memory_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (valid_until IS NULL OR valid_until > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) AND sensitivity_level != 'HIGH' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_memory_item SET memory_type = #{memoryType}, namespace = #{namespace}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, scope_id = #{scopeId}, subject_key = #{subjectKey}, content = #{content}, summary = #{summary}, evidence_refs_json = #{evidenceRefsJson}, source_task_id = #{sourceTaskId}, source_tool_call_id = #{sourceToolCallId}, source_review_id = #{sourceReviewId}, source_hash = #{sourceHash}, status = #{status}, confidence = #{confidence}, importance = #{importance}, sensitivity_level = #{sensitivityLevel}, consent_source = #{consentSource}, access_count = #{accessCount}, last_accessed_at = #{lastAccessedAt}, valid_from = #{validFrom}, valid_until = #{validUntil}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE agent_memory_item SET access_count = COALESCE(access_count, 0) + 1, last_accessed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
